stats.name: RP
stats.description: Rune Points. Used in all activities.

stats.name: STR
stats.description: Strength. Each STR increases ATK by 1.

stats.name: VIT
stats.description: Vitality. Each VIT increases DEF and M.DEF by 0.5.

stats.name: INT
stats.description: Intelligence. Each INT increases M.ATK by 1.

ailments.name: Poison
ailments.description: Receives damage every few seconds. Scales with Max HP. Can be removed using food items or Medipoison magic.

ailments.name: Seal
ailments.description: Prevents usage of skills and magic. Can be removed using food items or Mediseal magic.

ailments.name: Paralysis
ailments.description: Prevents character from running. Can be removed using food items or Mediparalyze magic.

ailments.name: Sleep
ailments.description: Temporarily disables character for a short duration. Character under sleep status is more vulnerable to critical attacks. Status is removed after a short duration or after the first attack made to the character.

ailments.name: Fatigue
ailments.description: Increases RP consumption for all activities. Can be removed using food items or bath.

ailments.name: Cold
ailments.description: RP is reduced every few seconds. Scales with Max RP. Can be removed using food items.

ailments.name: Knockout
ailments.description: Death in a single hit. Can be prevented using Faint Res.

ailments.name: Dizzy
ailments.description: Temporarily disables character for a short duration. Status is removed after a short duration.
